mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diets (mno, meal, eaten_date, title, photo_url, total_kcal, protein, carbs, fat) VALUES (#{mno}, #{meal}, #{eatenDate}, #{title}, #{photoUrl}, #{totalKcal}, #{protein}, #{carbs}, #{fat})
INSERT INTO diet_foods (dno, fno, name, kcal, protein, carbs, fat, source) VALUES (#{dno}, #{fno}, #{name}, #{kcal}, #{protein}, #{carbs}, #{fat}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diet_foods WHERE dno = #{dno} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE diets SET meal = #{meal}, eaten_date = #{eatenDate}, title = #{title}, total_kcal = #{totalKcal}, protein = #{protein}, carbs = #{carbs}, fat = #{fat} WHERE dno = #{dno}
